channel.title: Graphic Meat Field Notes
channel.description: Ideas on product design, private software and building useful independent apps.

item.title: What is Graphic Meat? Not vegan, not a butcher — it’s software.
item.description: Graphic Meat sells no food and is not a vegan brand. The name is graphical satire: meat stands for the substance of the work — the shipped result of coding.

item.title: The web solved automatic masonry. Why haven’t photobooks?
item.description: Why automatic photobook design needs crop awareness, hierarchy, rhythm and scoring—not only space filling.
